creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #3)
> > net-mgmt/nagiosql depends on nagios and nagios owns /var/spool/nagios, so you can ignore the directory.
> 
> That's what I thought as well, however this message should indicate a
> problem elsewhere.

I'm not sure why you are adding me back to the CC here ? Do you want me to debug the problem you are having with a port that is not mine ?
